nodes.name: backup.json
nodes.summary: Tracks backup state for Claude Flow daemon persistence, recording timestamp, rotation status, and whether backups were skipped due to database unavailability.

nodes.name: codebase-map.json
nodes.summary: Records the detected project structure including presence of configuration files (Claude config, Claude Flow config) and absence of Node/TypeScript configs, indicating a Swift/native project.

nodes.name: consolidation.json
nodes.summary: Logs pattern consolidation and memory distillation metrics from the Claude Flow intelligence pipeline, tracking deduplication, embedding generation, and pattern promotion across namespaces.

nodes.name: harness-loop.json
nodes.summary: Comprehensive harness loop configuration tracking flywheel state, lineage generation history, mutation axis effectiveness, and neural champion configuration for continuous improvement of Claude Flow's reasoning pipeline.
nodes.languageNotes: Tracks multi-axis hyperparameter tuning (alpha, subjectWeight, mmrLambda, bodyWeight, typePenaltyFactor) for ranking function optimization across generations.

nodes.name: performance.json
nodes.summary: System performance metrics capturing memory usage, process uptime, cache hit rates, and average response times for Claude Flow daemon operations.

nodes.name: security-audit.json
nodes.summary: Security posture assessment verifying environment file protection, gitignore presence, and absence of hardcoded secrets, with low-risk classification.

nodes.name: test-gaps.json
nodes.summary: Test coverage analysis tracking presence of test directories and test gap identification for the Avelo Swift project.
